headline: IDEXX Parasite Test Expansion Links Zoonotic Risk And Valuation Debate
summary: IDEXX Laboratories (NasdaqGS:IDXX) has expanded its Fecal Dx antigen testing to detect taeniid tapeworm in companion animals. The broadened panel includes medically significant Echinococcus species, a key zoonotic parasite of concern for veterinarians and public health officials. The update targets regions where taeniid tapeworm and Echinococcus are a growing focus for disease surveillance and prevention. IDEXX Laboratories, a veterinary diagnostics and software company, continues to build...
